recommendations.name: Collabora Online
recommendations.desc: Collabora Online is a powerful collaborative office suite that supports all major document, spreadsheet and presentation file formats, which you can integrate into your own infrastructure.

recommendations.name: OBS
recommendations.desc: Free and open source software for video recording and live streaming.

recommendations.name: kdenlive
recommendations.desc: Kdenlive is a video editing application with support for many audio and video formats. It offers advanced editing features, a variety of effects and transitions, color correction, audio post-production, and subtitling tools.

recommendations.name: KiCad
recommendations.tagline: A Cross Platform and Open Source PCB Design Suite
recommendations.desc: KiCad is a free and open-source electronics design automation (EDA) suite. It features schematic capture, integrated circuit simulation, printed circuit board (PCB) layout, 3D rendering, and plotting/data export to numerous formats.  KiCad has minimal system requirements and runs on Linux, Windows, and macOS.

recommendations.name: OpenSCAD
recommendations.desc: OpenSCAD is a solid 3D modeler that enables the creation of parametric models using its scripting language. Models are created by utilizing a technique called constructive solid geometry. According to this technique, simple objects can be transformed and combined in order to create almost any complex model.

recommendations.name: Kile
recommendations.desc: Kile is a user-friendly TeX/LaTeX editor by KDE. Kile is available for many architectures and operating systems such as PC, Mac, and BSD, including Linux and Microsoft Windows.

profiles.name: Carston Wiebe

profiles.bio: I'm a Linux enthusiast, programmer, metal musician and guitarist, and poet.
